title: Bad business. No guarantee
body: Bought 2 pairs of shoes, 1 for me and 1 for my son. The shoes were not comfortable for either one of us. They hurt our feet and back after just 1 use. My son felt the uncomfortableness just from trying them on. I've been in contact with comfortwear through email, trying to send the shoes back for a refund. They say money back guarantee withing 45 days, it hasn't even been 10 days and they won't refund me. They recommend that I continue to wear the shoes.

body:

As a final offer, (all this via email), they want me to go to the salvation army to donate them and give them proof of donation and then I guess they will give my money back or come up with some other tactic to avoid sending it. They also offered me a 50% refund and to keep the shoes which would have been fantastic if the shoes were not flawed and another person could truly enjoy. Free shipping, returns and exchanges -- pure fantasy.

title: These are the first shoes that were…
body:
These are the first shoes that were comfy from the start!

I have several feet issues from a bunion, to flat feet and on my feet thru most of shift.

So, I was skeptical of next purchase. I even had to wear a half size bigger because my feet had become so swollen.

The stretch material helped alleviate friction to my bunion.

I was a tad concerned about heel height and wondered if that would force toes forward. But, I liked the idea of space between feet and floors.

They are functional, affordable, and so darn cute!! That is what I was looking for! I received so many compliments!

The no-lace shoe is the only one's I will wear and that box checked, too!

I hope you consider making some short boots for winter.

Deb M.

title: Not real happy about the sizing of the…
body: Not real happy about the sizing of the shoes. I ordered a size US 9, which i usually wear but they were small. My toe was at the end of the shoe. Contacted Customer Service for an exchange (which you say free exchanges, et al) and kind of got the run around. Was offered a 20% refund which I didn't accept. After numerous emails back and forth, I finally accepted the offer of you sending me another pair free. I accepted this offer for a pair of the same shoes I had ordered but in a size US 9 1/2. Finally got them but believe me, they were not that much bigger but at least my toes weren't at the end of the shoe. After comparing them to other size 9 I have, they are still a lot smaller. Someone needs to check how your sizing is done. I am sure I am not the only one that has had problems with sizing. You advertise free returns, exchanges, etc but it is really hard to get them. It looks like false advertising to me if you have to fight for an exchange, which is what I wanted.

title: Made in China. Not as advertised.
body:
First, be aware that the promised 45 day money back guarantee will not be honored. They will initially offer you a discount, then another pair of shoes (same cost) free of charge. If you want a refund, they will ask you to donate the shoes and send proof.
Unfortunately, the shoe sizing is inconsistent by style. One style runs small, another style runs large, if you're lucky, your chosen style will run true to size. Once you accept the offer of a second pair, that is the end of the line. If they don't fit or aren't as advertised, too bad!
Secondly, the shoes are not as advertised nor made in the US. They come from China.

body:

body:

title: I am reporting this company for failing…
body:
I am reporting this company for failing to deliver my order
In January, I ordered a pair of shoes and soles from this company. The total amount I paid for the order was more than $80. To this day, I have not received the products I paid for.
I have contacted the company multiple times asking for an update, but each time they give me the same excuse, claiming that the package was returned due to an address issue. I have already verified that my address is correct, so this explanation does not make sense.
Despite repeated requests, they have not resent the order and they have not issued a refund. Instead, they continue asking me to wait another week or a few more days while they supposedly “resolve the problem,” but nothing ever gets resolved.
I have kept all the email communications as proof that they continue delaying the situation without providing any real solution.
At this point, it appears they are simply delaying the process until they can claim that too much time has passed to issue a refund.
I am formally requesting either the immediate delivery of my order or a full refund.

title: Awesome..after buying the…
body:
Awesome..after buying the 1st pair..noticed a huge difference on my foot..walked half hr with my new Sneaks..ordered a second pair.. work shoes..these are Amazing they work.. dont buy any other for hundreds of dollars...that your Dr tells you .
these are very very Good Shoes..a 10/10 service 👌 😀 👏 👍 😄

title: The shoes are very comfortable
body: The shoes are very comfortable. I was frustrated that it took over two weeks to get them.

title: Shoes did not fit
body: I ordered size 9 but when the shoes arrived they did not fit onto my feet (too small). Their shoes run smaller than U.S. size. I would suggest purchasing 1-2 sizes larger than normal. They agreed to provide an e-gift card at 100% of order value which I was satisfied with.

title: The shoes are a perfect fit
body: The shoes are a perfect fit. Still some foot pain but not like in the past. Only problem they are starting to seek when walking

title: Im trying to reach customer service…
body: Im trying to reach customer service shoes r too small

title: The ordering was easy and fit great
body: The ordering was easy, the communication was good. Not great but good for communication. The delivery took some time, not sure where the origin was but took more time than I figured it would take. The shoes were finally delivered and I have been wearing them for several days. They are comfortable, takes a motto get used to as the heel is higher than the rest of the shoe. Planning on wearing them on an outing for several hours and hope they stay comfortable.

title: Easy to order on line
body: Easy to order on line. Received order quickly.

title: I've only had a day to wear them but…
body:
I've only had a day to wear them but they are fairly comfortable and definitely light weight, which is nice.
However, they have a very strong chemical smell when you open the package.

title: Super comfortable
body: Super comfortable! Stretchy material, no laces and very flexible. Love the non-slip bottom and most of all, my feet didn't hurt after day 1!

title: Not as advertised “waterproof” sneakers
body: I bought a pair of sneakers that were supposed to be waterproof, even with light rain my feet are soaked. A lot of water gets inside starting from toes.

title: Comfortable shoes
body: Comfortable shoes. Lightweight.

title: This company is a scam
body: This company is a scam. Everything on their website is a lie. I am still in the process of trying to return my shoes, which actually made my foot pain worse rather than better. I contacted the company about my request for their money-back guarantee and now I am getting the run around. They have offered to give me 30% back or pay for a full new pair of a different style. I have responded clearly that I simply want my money back as promised on their website. They have refused for multiple reasons, including pretending that they have strong environmental concerns and don't want to have to dispose of my shoes if they come back with problems. This is ridiculous. Don't buy from them.

title: NO PAIN
body: These shoes are the most comfortable I've ever had. When I put them on and walked there was no pain. Two days later I wore them all day and my feet never hurt.

title: JUNK product and POOR customer service
body:
My daughter got these things 2/21/26. The minute she got them she tried them on. She has plantar fasciitis and WIDE feet. She couldn’t even get them on. Started the return process that day This is what was sent back in an email Thanks for contacting us.
It makes me really sad that you are returning your order. May I know the reason for the return so I can better assist you?
Thank you for your support and have a wonderful day!

Christos, Customer Service
ComfortWear
Then after I stated that they didn’t fit they sent this reply :
Thank you for reaching out to us. I’m so sorry to hear that the shoes aren’t fitting as expected, but don’t worry—I’ll be happy to assist you.
To help us resolve this quickly, could you please send us a photo of the pair you received, including a clear view of the shoe size? You should be able to find the size printed on the insole (inside the shoe) OR it is attached/embroidered on the tongue of the shoes.
Also, could you let us know how the shoes fit—are they too big, too small, too tight, or too loose? This will help us better understand the issue and provide the best solution for you.
Thank you for your support, and I look forward to your reply. Wishing you a wonderful day!

Christos, Customer Service
ComfortWear

ARE you kidding me? I gave you the order # so YOU take pictures and then look at the size. You sent them. Then yesterday was this reply:

Thanks for contacting us.
It makes me really sad that you are returning your order. This is not the kind of experience we want you to have.
Can I offer you a 30% refund for the order? For us, it would be a shame and a waste of material if we were to dispose of it after we inspect it. This way, you can offer these as a gift to someone as well. Let me know what you think! We are pro-sustainability so we are trying to minimize material waste as much as we can.
Thank you for your support and have a wonderful day!

Christos, Customer Service
ComfortWear.
NO I want a full refund of my $. I don’t care if your heart is broken because you have to “dispose “ of the shoes
As of today and they only respond once a day. This is their reply:

Thanks for getting back to us.
We understand you no longer wish to keep the shoes, and we truly appreciate your honesty. For health and hygiene reasons—and as part of our commitment to sustainability—we kindly ask customers to keep their items. This helps us protect our team and reduce unnecessary waste, especially when the product is still in good condition.
Instead of a return, we’d love to offer you a gift card equal to your original order amount, which you can use toward any future purchase.
We hope this solution works for you and shows our commitment to making things right. Just let us know if you'd like to proceed with the gift card, and we’ll get it issued right away.
Thank you for your understanding and continued support. If you have any questions, we’re always here to help.

Christos, Customer Service
ComfortWear

title: Don't waste your money
body: The shoes are poorly made and not worth the money. They were shipped directly from China and took almost a month. Very cheap quality material. I work in Healthcare and as a server and the shoes were so uncomfortable I had to change back into my old shoes to get through my 8 hour shift! They claimed to be anti skid, not the case, at all. So very dangerous to wear as well.

title: Great arch support and style.
body: I am just in the process of getting acquainted with my new shoes. It has been years since I bought new shoes. They are a little snug, so I am wearing them for a few hours inside. I think they are going to be comfortable when I get used to the support. I love the color and the style.

title: 0 stars
body: DO NOT BUY THESE SHOES!!! I would give this company 0 stars if I could. The shoes themselves are terrible. There is no support for my feet and I have really bad plantar faciitis and heal spurs. Trying to get in touch with customer service is a nightmare. The number goes straight to an automated recording that tells you to email them. The person I have been emailing is giving me the run around. She first tried to make me keep them for 45 days. Then offered a gift card return but only 20%. I said no I want a full refund and now she's making me show a proof of donation of the shoes before I get my refund! I wore the shoes just long enough, inside my house, to realize they weren't right for my condition. They refuse to take them back and their money back guarantee is a lie. DO NOT BUY THESE SHOES!!

title: These shoes look great
body: These shoes look great. They are very comfortable. I feel like I'm bare foot. This is the first time I have purschased shoes that are excatly as advertised. If you are looking for comfort these are the shoes for you.

title: Great products
body: Easy to order and products are great but a little pricey.

title: I really like them
body: I really like them. Put together really well. Comfortable. Took a while to come but as the saying goes, ‘ good things come to those who wait.’ Thank you

title: Chemical smell plastic knockoff sneakers
body: These are plastic knockoff sneakers! A one star for the colors and look, but these shoes were delivered and smelled like chemicals. They were light weight so that was another star, but for the discount $49 shoe reporting to be an Ortho shoe clearly is off the mark! I used my HSA card and will track it to ensure no other charges are made.

title: Good experience, but had to return the shoes due to foot pain
body: The experience was good because it was very easy to navigate the website. Shipping was fairly fast unfortunately my shoes had to be returned because my feet were still hurting.

title: The shoes are super comfortable!!!
body: I thought they might be too small. I contacted comfort wear and it was easy to do and the rep was happy to help me. I decided to stick with that size but it was great to know I could easily return them. If the return is free, then fantastic. If not, that would be a bummer. The two said she would send me a label which I didn't need in the end

title: I think I got the wrong size because…
body: I think I got the wrong size because the are to big on the bottom.

title: Definitely NOT worth the money
body: The shoes were the most uncomfortable things I’ve ever worn. When I complained I received a gift voucher so I bought some insoles which weren’t cheap. They, if it’s possible are worse than the shoes. Do yourself a favour and steer well clear of these products .

title: You will not be refunded, don't buy!
body: The company claims to have a refund policy if you are not satisfied with their shoes. I bought a pair of shoes that from the very first day I wore them they hurt my feet. The shoe had no structure so my toes were being pushed forward causing so much pain. I'm here to tell you that the company is not going to give you a refund. It's been over a year and I have yet to be reimbursed. Please don't buy these shoes.

title: Very happy with my shoes
body: Very happy with my shoes. Website easy to use. Shoes seem well made with good orthopedic footing. Very attractive look too. Only complaint would be took a couple weeks to ship.

title: I've been wearing the sneakers for at…
body:
Hi I've been wearing the sneakers for at least 2 weeks and sometimes my feet feel find at the end of the day and on other days my feet are hurting me at the end of the day. I do an eight hour shift Monday-Friday. I have osteoporosis, burning feet (24/7) knee pain, back pain ect. 64 yrs old female 105 lbs. I like them but not sure if it's the best one for me. What would you recommend. Dawn
So if I can't find a pair where can I send them back and get my refund as you stated when I brought the sneakers . They still hurt my feet I want a refund.

title: if I could give this company zero Stars…
body: if I could give this company zero Stars I would, I received my shoes one shoe is way tighter than the other one so I notified them where do I send the shoes back? well they refuse to let me know where to send them back and as far as a refund I'm not getting a refund they had the nerve to say they'd give me 20% of what I paid for the shoes, I said no that's ridiculous so next time it was they'll give me a gift certificate, well why would I buy another pair of shoes when you can't send them back and get a refund worst company I've ever dealt with

title: Great for Healthcare employees
body:
Great for Healthcare employees! I work in a prison healthcare system. I do lots of walking and standing. I wore other name brand shoes for years and they would become worn down in a few weeks. So being desperate for good shoes designed for Healthcare workers, I did some research. This brand of shoes came up a lot in my research and was covered under my FSA/HSA benefits.
These are some of the most comfortable shoes I have ever worn. These shoes are cheaper than the other named brand shoes I have worn and seem to be much better quality. Highly recommend!

title: The whole experience was really easy…
body: The whole experience was really easy and I love that I can use my HSA card. I will be placing orders in the future.

title: The customer service is spectacular
body: The customer service is spectacular. The only reason I gave four stars is because the shoes aren't working out for me.

title: BEST SHOES EVER!
body: I thought these shoes couldnt be as good as advertised...they are Better! I have bunions and balance issues...my new shoes made me forget my feet have any issues. These are the most comfortable I have ever worn. Love them - bought a second pair soon after first pair.

title: I was excited to find your email and…
body: I was excited to find your email and read about your shoes. When they arrived I took them out and tried to put them on. I was not successful! The back of the shoes folded in and I could not get it out from under my heel. So I tried to get the other shoe on and the same thing happened. I was not going to give up. My next attempt was using a shoe horn and unfortunately when I removed it the heel was too tight for me. I am willing to try other methods if you have some to recommend for me. As I mentioned to a couple of your wonderful customer care people I am in the process of moving so won’t have a finite amount of time to try other things for at least two or three weeks.

title: The shoes are hard to get on.
body: The shoes are a little hard for me to put on. It took a long time over a week to receive my shoes. I didn't get any messages to let me know when I would receive my package. The shoes are comfortable when I get them on.

title: Difficult to put on.
body: I did not realize the shoes were made in China and would take so long to arrive. Once they did arrive I found them to be extremely difficult to get on. They are very soft with no support at the back of the shoe so slipping into them is not easy. I have to pull the back away to get them in and stick two fingers behind my heal. It’s very awkward.

title: Amazing shoes very comfortable i work…
body: Amazing shoes very comfortable i work in nursing on my feet alot I was having troubles with my feet everyday I wore my new shoes the frist day & my feet didn't hurt like I couldn't walk on them they felt amazing thank you

title: Toe box is wide and can’t be laced tighter.
body: The shoes are quite difficult to get on, as they don’t open as far as normal shoes. My toes touch the end with every step because the width of the toe box is big and the stretchy laces can’t tighten it up. I can’t get a bigger size because they are already a bit sloppy on my feet. It’s frustrating as they are really nice looking.

title: I would recommend these
body: Only a week in, but so far they feel very comfortable. Love the roomy toe bed and light weight of this sneaker! The company was also very good about keeping me updated on the delivery status.

title: And I don't even have my shoes yet!
body:
And I don't even have my shoes yet!
I ordered 2 pair and discovered rather quickly- I need a .5 size larger.
They have been very accommodating with my re-order and so far, the refund information.
Can't wait to get my shoes!

title: No refunds despite policy
body: The shoes took weeks to arrive and were cheap plastic with the size number on the outside of the shoes ! Most uncomfortable however they refuse to answer my emails about a return or stand by their advertised refund policy. Never again. Don’t do it. I’m

title: Reliable company. No false ads
body: The shoe fits well and is very comfortable to wear. Toe box is nice and roomy and they feel good to walk in. I've only worn in the house as we live in a cold snowy climate. I had a severe ankle injury in November and this is giving me good support. My only concern is in the model I purchased, I wish the back of the shoe was more firm as it is a little more difficult to get on. Another plus is they are nice and light weight. The color is very nice. I got the black and aqua.

title: Softer than slippers
body: I thought I was ordering regular sneakers, but what I got was dressier than regular sneakers. And they are more comfortable than some slippers that I own!

title: I was apprehensive about buying these…
body: I was apprehensive about buying these shoes especially when I saw that they cane from overseas , I have spent a small fortune on shoes from almost always overseas however, I have only worn them for one day today will be my second day in them full time. I will find out today when my shift is over just exactly how they make my feet feel! I have bone spurs on my last three toes on my right foot, i was told that my toes were deformed & that they would need implants 😳⁉️ I say B.S. alls they had to do was cut the tendons under my toes so that they would lay flat. Anyway, I could not nor would not be able to afford this ridiculous procedure. So I rolled the dice on these shoes & so far so good!

title: They took too long to come in
body: They took too long to come in. I don't like to sneaker because the heel is uneven

title: They are not comfortable at all
body: They are not comfortable at all. I'm trying to get the return procedure and they will not respond.

title: The shopping and checkout process is…
body: The shopping and checkout process is easy, the shoes are not quite so comfortable

title: The shoes arrived quickly
body: The shoes arrived quickly. I have hard to fit feet, I couldn't wear them but I found someone who can.

title: Difficult returns despite "money back guarantee"
body: I have had a terrible time returning and getting a refund despite their online money back guarantee. i have lost count of the numerous emails that have gone back and forth over the last 2 weeks. They offer for me to keep the shoes with a 20% discount etc.- which is not helpful because I can't wear them. Their latest request is that I donate to Salvation Army and then supply the company with the receipt and they will then authorize a refund. I don't trust them to do this and I am an elderly person who uses pickups to donate so this is inconvenient and at this point I am waiting for a response from the Better Business Bureau as I filed a complaint yesterday before I got this latest ridiculous offer.

title: Awful journey to get a refund with ComfortWear
body: I received my pair of comfortwear shoes and the ankle height was uncomfortable for me, so I began a long awful journey with this company to get a refund. They made it complicated and drawn out and made me jump through SO MANY hoops, including having to drive the shoes to a donation center, take a photo, send it to them in order to get a refund. Each interaction was through email, (there's not way to communicate directly on their website). It was flat out awful. Additionally, they sent me four pair of compression socks that I didn't order $56, and they didn't want to refund, nor take them back (unopened). Buyer beware, their customer service is wretched.

title: O My feet hurt
body: I am having problems with the bottom of my feet, all shoes I have is uncomfortable to wear because they are difficult to wear, the ComfortWear shoe has more cushion in the bottom of their shoe making them easier to wear, giving my feet time to change and maybe stop the pain.

title: Shoes may be good but returns are a nightmare
body: It appears that if you happen to get a pair of shoes that fit you are good, however, if the shoes don't fit you are in the cycle of trying to return the shoes and them trying to not take them back. I have requested 4 times via email and phone for an address where I can return the shoes and I have only gotten the "we will give you 20% back and you can keep them" or "we will give you a charity you can donate them to for a tax write off". I want them to honor the 45 day full refund policy and I think they are trying to delay it until the time runs out. Also I found that you can buy these shoes on the Walmart website for less money.

title: Comfortable
body: These shoes are so comfortable that I didn't want to take them off!

title: Excellent
body: I love the shoes you sold me

title: Shoes are very comfortable and fit…
body: Shoes are very comfortable and fit well. True to size. Quick postage

title: Very Comfortable
body: Although it seemed to take forever for my shoes to arrive, they came and were comfortable from the moment I put them on. I have worn them several days and I am very happy with them. The toe box lets you wiggle your toes. The support is like air under your feet. And I have big feet!

title: Lightweight and comfy
body:
The shoes are lightweight, roomy and comfortable. They are attractive enough to wear anywhere I normally go to!
Glad they were on sale so it made it easy to try them!

title: Order never delivered
body: Ordered rather expensive sneakers mid January. Company said it came from China but was at a local facility a week after ordering. But still not arrived, now mid Feb. Company will not respond to questions and is unreachable by phone. BBB had 132 complaints on them when I filed mine. Comfortshoes will not refund.

title: The shoes came in looking good
body: The shoes came in looking good, but were too small.

title: Beware the sizing and 45-day return…
body: Beware the sizing and 45-day return policy. They list US sizes on their website but they are EU sizes when received and the 45-day return policy is not true. I ordered two pair of shoes and both were way bigger than they should have been based on the sizes I ordered. I attempted to return them noting the 45-day return policy and was told that they do not accept returns but could give me 20% back on my order. I argued the policy and received a gift certificate for my total order to re-purchase the shoes. That was a fine option that I was happy with. I ordered both shoes again; I think one size down since the shoes I received were EU sizes and the sizes on the site are listed as US sizes. I also added the size correction fee to the order knowing that they may still not fit correctly. One pair was fine but the other was too small now. I reached out and even with the size correction fee, I cannot return or exchange them. The shoes that do fit are comfortable so that's a plus.

title: Order your size
body: I love the design of the shoe y’all recommend going up a half a size and I did that but it’s too big my feet keeps slipping and it makes it uncomfortable to walk now I’m trying to send them back. Not sure how to do that. Please help me to do that and get a size 7 instead of a 7 1/2 and maybe I can give a good review after that thank you.

title: comfort wear shoes
body: The size was the right size, and the quality is pretty good, however getting the shoes on is terrible. The shoes are so soft that they aren't stiff enough to slide on very well. I try to put my shoe horn in to help but it isn't really easy to use with the soft material.

title: Pain Relief That Actually Works
body: These shoes offer real support and comfort. After wearing them daily, I’ve felt less strain in my feet, knees, and lower back. The fit is true to size, and the quality feels solid and long-lasting.

title: I order a bundle of shoes was 3 pairs
body: I order a bundle of shoes was 3 pairs. I tried to do return and refund in the 45 days but they said only get 20% refund not all of it. They are not comfortable, the size is true not what they say, not support for heel and rest of the foot and ankle. It’s true size what it say.

title: The rating is zero,delivery service…
body:
The rating is zero,delivery service sucks,I am
so disappointed...I order November of 2025..Called both the company and
courier service, All the customers service said was "It's not our fault ma'am if the you were not able to get your order"... No apology from customer service from both the company and the courier company...Now
I'm hoping they will process my refund soon...I cannot recommend a company like this when serices sucks,it will only give stress to the buyer...

title: Received the order as anticipated
body: Received the order as anticipated. Shoes are soft, size is accurate. Dropped a star as there is no arch support as described

title: I am fighting with them now
body: I am fighting with them now. I never opened the product. It came late. You couldn't cancel it. Returning an unopened product saying they will give me 30%. I will never order from them again. They told me to open the product comes in a plastic bag. I said no I want a full refund. They are only saying 30%.

title: Everything was super simple and easy!!!!!!!!!!!
body:
Everything was super simple and easy. Shipping didn't take long at all and delivery was great !!!
I loved the products so much I ordered more.
Sizes are actually a bit bigger than actual so I would not size up at all, maybe size down but 1/2
. The look of the shoes looks narrow but again they are not !!!!!!!! Great fit and comfy too!!!!!

title: I ordered 2 pair of shoes
body: I ordered 2 pair of shoes. Both came in the wrong size, and 2 different sizes at that. Comfort Wear asked for photos of the sizes as proof which I did and this was accepted. They then told me to donate both pairs to a charity store which I did and sent photo proof of same. This was accepted via email on January 9 but I've yet to receive my refund of $157.60 now 3 weeks out. No new emails from the company. I'm beginning to think I'm out of options

title: They kept me updated on my order
body: They kept me updated on my order. They quickly answered any questions I had.

title: Long shipping times
body: Didn't realize when I ordered that the shoes were coming from the Orient so delivery took longer than I had expected. Shoes did arrive but are bigger than I need. Sizes must run larger than shoes in the US. I'm not returning since it would have to go overseas and take a long time to replace.

title: Very comfy shoes
body: Shoes we're great! One issue I had was the smell of the shoes. The chemical smell was so strong it stunk up my whole house. Easy fix, and I know this sounds ridiculous, but it worked. I put them back in the bag and put them in my freezer for 2 days. Lol, ridiculous huh? But it worked like a charm no more smell. They are very comfortable. Perfect, I just had surgery on both my feet and they worked out great.

title: I like the style of the shoes
body: I like the style of the shoes. The elevated heel helps cushion my arthritic knees. They are difficult to put on. And they don’t have arch support. They are not memory foam, and only comfortable with thicker socks. They are advertised as being good shoes to wear all day as a nurse. I’m not sure if that’s true.

title: Received the shoes and tried them
body:
Received the shoes and tried them. Didn't like them at all. No support through the sides. Have spent many hours trying to get a refund. The lastest email is they want me to accept 30% refund and give the shoes to someone. They say its in support of sustainability. I'm asking for a full refund and they can give the shoes to someone.
I won't recommend these shoes.

title: Life-Changing Comfort
body: I’ve struggled with foot and heel pain for years, and these shoes have made a noticeable difference. The built-in orthotic insoles provide excellent support from heel to toe, and I can now stay on my feet much longer without discomfort. Ordering from the U.S. was easy, and the shoes arrived quickly and well packaged.

title: I couldn't walk because of my heel
body:
I couldn't walk because of my heel, and now since I got these shoes its like walking and no pain. I will definitely buy more from this company. Thank you.
Melissa

title: Great customer contact
body: Great customer contact. I was notified of the progress of my order throughout delivery. The shoes seem a little on the large roomy side, so I added insoles to help with that. My laces are pulled to the max, but the length of the shoe is perfect.

title: I love the way they feel on my feet.
body: I love the way they feel on my feet.

title: My order was here in no time
body: My order was here in no time. The 1st pair I ordered, I love the no shoe laces. The 2nd pair Blue I lovec the wide toe.

title: Very satisfied
body: Very satisfied. Solid company.

title: Don't fit; Not honoring 45 day return policy
body:
I had the same experience as others here... they don't fit, and they're only offering me a 30% refund.
The thing is, I bought two pairs in the SAME SIZE, and one fits while the other is way too small. For the pair that fits, the verdict is still out for me on whether or not they're a good shoe... Like others, I've had issues with them being slippery on the inside, and I can't entirely decide if they're comfortable or not.

For the pair that doesn't fit, they are way too small and cause a lot of pain. I tried to wear them for a couple of full days to see if they would stretch out, but they just caused pain. Makes no sense b/c I bought the same shoes in the same size. Customer service had me verify the size that was sent, and I sent pix, and they responded saying that they sent the correct size, but would offer me 30% back. I responded back stating that I never said they sent the wrong size, and informed them that the other pair in the same size fits, so I either need a refund or exchange. I'm waiting for a response on that one.

I bought mine with FSA funds, so that's another factor. I don't think that I can fight the charges in the same way that I do on a regular credit card. I DO NOT RECOMMEND THIS COMPANY.

title: I like what you offer …
body: I like what you offer but the communication between us has not been good. I am still awaiting a second pair of shoes I ordered several weeks ago.

title: Not sure I would recommend these shoes.
body: Shipping took a little while but I received in good condition. Not sure I would recommend these shoes as they don’t feel very durable to me. And I don’t really like the tie cord.

title: Fairly quick shipping
body: Fairly quick shipping. Product is nicely made and very comfortable to wear. Love the color.

title: Choosing the style and size I needed…
body:
Choosing the style and size I needed was simple and I got exactly what I expected.
I do hair behind the chair, and have been at it for 39 years. These shoes have been terrific.

title: Bad all around
body: Where to begin...I bought 2 pairs of comfort wear ortho shoes. It took a month to get here. Tracking is terrible. One pair fit and one didnt and both were a size 9. One was to small. I could not get ahold of customer service. I just kept getting coupons for next purchase. Shoes are very bad quality. Some wierd hard plastic on the bottom and the toes bubble on top. Now im out money and no good shoes to wear. I do not reccomend at all!!

title: Support Sucks
body: I was hoping this company would support their product, but it doesn't appear they do. These shoes don't fit properly on my wife's feet, and when I tried to return them, they wouldn't provide any return information, though they say they are returnable with no charge to us. Instead, they say to wear them till they break in. Frankly, they are a waste of money for anyone thinking they are buying a quality product, as might be so if bought from a quality company, which this company obviously isn't. Not sure our trash can can wear them, but going to give it a shot.

title: Do not waste your time
body:
The shoes ran at least one size small they also had almost no cushioning. Some of most uncomfortable shoes I have ever tried.
While they offer a 45-day return window they really do not want to honor it, after several emails where they made offers to do anything to keep from refunding my money I was finally able to get a full refund. My advice is to avoid this company.

title: Money back guarantee?
body:
I recently purchased a pair of ComfortWear shoes; they are very attractive and I'm sure would be comfortable, but I feel unsteady when I stand in them, don't want to take the risk of wearing them, and would like to return the shoes.
Today I wrote my 4th letter to their Customer Service requesting a full refund of the purchase price; thus far, they are only offering me a gift card for the same price to purchase a different pair of their shoes. I am hoping that they will, indeed, honor their 45-day money back guarantee.

title: These shoes are horrible
body: These shoes are horrible. I ordered my normal size and they were way too large. When I tried to return them, I was informed that the correct size was ordered by me and no refund was forthcoming. Do not order anything from this terrible company. Their customer service is a joke.

title: Took to long to come an they are not…
body: Took to long to come an they are not very comfortable my feet still hurt while working feels really hard no cushion what so ever

title: Low quality product, company does not honor refund policy and ghastly customer service
body:
I'm a nurse who works 12 hour shifts.

When I needed a new pair of shoes, I noticed an ad for Comfort Wear.

It is well known that despite measuring one's feet and following size-guides from various shoe manufacturers, each manufacturer and often each shoe model can vary in actual size and fitment.

The typical issue with ordering online is getting the size right.

The other thing is when buying from a new brand, one never knows the actual quality of the product until it arrives.

Anyway, I checked Comfort Wear's refund and returns policies. The company assured that it would refund if I didn't like the product. So I thought I would try them out.

I eagerly ordered a pair of shoes after making physical measurements of my feet and matching them against the Comfort Wear size guide.

When the shoes arrived, they were a little larger than what the measurements indicated. In addition to the low quality, the material was cheap and the soles were certainly not orthotic by any standard.

So I rang their customer service number a few times to request a refund -- and left voicemails regarding the same.

Zero response.

In good faith I emailed them on December 21st, 2025 requesting a return and refund.

Again, there was absolutely no response for several days, and yet I gave Comfort Wear the benefit of the doubt because it was holiday season.

However, the company shamelessly sent me a review request asking me to rate my experience. I responded by explaining that I was still waiting for their response to my refund request.

It was only then that someone replied asking me to detail what the problem was.

The company asking me to re-type everything I had already informed them about in my refund request was annoying, but I obliged.

Again, there was no response from Comfort Wear for a while. I rang their customer service number and never got a response despite leaving several voicemails.

I sent another email, and once more the customer service asked me to explain the problem -- although I had already done so twice.

I responded that I simply wanted a refund.

After some back and forth where the customer service played dumb, someone finally emailed me whether I would be okay to accept a gift card for the value of my purchase instead of a refund.

Exhausted and sick of their third world attitude, I just said 'yes' because I knew by now that I had lost my money down the Comfort Wear black hole.

They sent me an email with a digital gift card that could only be used on their website. Clearly, the company believed in repeated torture as a means to retain its unwilling customers.

By this point, I had already purchased another pair of nice shoes at Rack Room at around the same price as the third rate garbage I had gotten from Comfort Wear.

But anyway, I re-estimated the shoe size and used the gift card to purchase another pair from Comfort Wear.

As expected, low quality shoes arrived -- and this time they fit. Except that the material quality was so bad that my toes hurt from wearing these horrible shoes with zero arch support, terrible sole material and c-grade build quality.

This time I didn't even bother contacting this third-rate company or risk torture by its ghastly customer service -- instead, my husband and I gleefully watched as both pairs of accursed shoes burnt away to a cinder in our fire-pit as we enjoyed a nice backyard barbecue to celebrate the end of the Comfort Wear curse.

Winter in central Florida has its perks, I guess.

In effect, my perception is that Comfort Wear is a third rate company run by fraudulent people who source cheap trash made overseas and market it as orthotic shoes.

My husband checked online and found that other Comfort Wear customers had experienced the same scam and reported it on Better Business Bureau and elsewhere.

Never going back to these cheats ever again, and neither will any of my neighbors -- they've all not only seen the so-called orthotic shoes but also witnessed my painful experience dealing with Dis-Comfort Wear.

title: No refunds
body: I bought these and wore them 1 time for 60 minutes in the house. They do not fit well and I wanted a refund. They have refused.

title: Waste of money! Cheap Walmart shoes!
body: The first thing that went wrong was the misleading advertisement about where they are made, shipped from and the low quality all around. They are made in and shipped from CHINA! They took nearly 3 weeks to arrive and we're delivered in a plastic bag. Couldn't even bother with a box! There is little to no arch support at all. The material is flimsy and I have no doubt they will fall apart within a couple months like $20 Walmart sneakers. The first day I wore them they felt ok. Nothing mind blowing. Day 2 I could hardly walk after 3 hours. I ended up having to purchase arch supports anyway! If I had known all this ahead of time I never would have bothered with buying them!

title: What a letdown.
body:
Hi, I was so excited to wear these shoes!!

They just arrived and I excitedly opened the package to find how poorly they are made as well as not fitting properly and zero support.
The fabric on the top of the shoe does nothing to secure my foot in place and the weird shoe laces simply make sure my foot stays inside the shoe. The left toe box is more narrow than the right side and the amount of fabric that creates an odd lump on the inner sides of both shoe is just that. Its odd. I emailed the company and am hoping for a free return and full refund.

title: Not worth the price
body: The shoes I bought don’t even feel like orthopedic support after wearing them for a month I thought I had broken them in I tried to use them for my long distance walks and all they did was hurt my feet so think twice before you buy them they are lousy and don’t live up to the description never again.

title: I received my shoe order from you on…
body: I received my shoe order from you on December 30, 2025. I took them out of the package was going to try them on but they smelled so bad I couldn’t! I put them on my covered lanai to air out! I brought them back inside on January 10, 2006! They didn’t smell as bad so I was trying them on and I couldn’t get my feet through the fabric at the top! So how do I return them with my free shoe bag which also smelled inside! I need a refund of $59.95.

title: They said satisfaction guaranteed
body: They said satisfaction guaranteed. I cannot even put these on my feet, both knees replaced and since they don't lace up, which I did not realize in the add, I cannot get my foot into them. They said they would give me 45 days to try them. Well, if I can't get them on on day one what makes anyone think I can get them on on day 45. After explaining to someone from the company, they said they would offer me 30% refund. I guess they think I will send them back for a 30% refund so they can resell them to some other sucker.

title: Very Dissapointed
body: Bought these shoes for my wife who is a NICU nurse, so on her feet for 12 hour shifts. Shoes arrived after a bit, but are too small and there is no wide toe box. Will check on returns but based on other reviews not very hopeful.

title: Customer service told me to donate these shoes to Salvation Army I couldn’t wear and after I send proof they will refund. NOT SO!
body:
I have requested a return and refund many many times. The no response is astoundingly frustrating. They emailed me they do not take returns. They said they will refund the money for the shoes if I donate them to Salvation Army and send proof of their receipt. I did that. I sent them a screenshot. They ignore my many emails.
I only tried the shoes did not wear. But due to the fit, I could not wear and was afraid of falling .
I am elder and I certainly have had a horrible experience with this company.

title: Shoddy untrusted
body: I ordered over and month ago. They did not get delivered and when I discussed with comfortwear they just sent me the same reply to contact a courier company which is not able to be contacted and doesn’t recognise the tracking number - Ive lost about $80 nzd!!!

title: SCAM!
body:
SCAM!! DO NOT ORDER FROM THIS COMPANY!! READ ALL THE NEGATIVE REVIEWS AND YOU WILL SEE WHY. RETURN POLICY IS A JOKE. THEY WONT TAKE SHOES BACK.

Bought these because i read all the great reviews but what I should have done was read the negative reviews. THERE IS NO RETURN POLICY!! They give you the runaround and offer 30% return and keep the shoes or donate and send them picture and receipt. Its a joke!! The shoes were a joke. It looked unfinished, no tags anywhere to let you know what the size is, no cushioning at all and no grip. Like I said, these shoes look unfinished. I ordered a size 10 and it was so tight it felt like a size 9. Don't waste your money because you won't get it back.

title: "NON" comfort wear
body:
I wanted to share my experience with the recent footwear purchase. As a nurse, I rely on comfortable and supportive shoes to get through long, 12-hour shifts on hard floors, so I was drawn to this product after seeing it advertised as offering extra cushioning and arch support.
Unfortunately, I was disappointed to find that the shoe did not provide the cushioning and support I expected. After wearing them for two shifts, I experienced significant knee and foot pain, which I have not felt with other footwear. Their was no comfort experienced, and I did not notice any arch support.
I have worn them for 2 shifts only, and I will not be able to continue wearing these shoes. I hope my feedback can help inform future improvements, especially for customers in roles that require supportive footwear. Thank you for your attention to this matter.

title: Integrity Issues
body: Integrity Issues. Advertising 40% off side wide but only found a single woman's shoe at 40%. Most of the rest were about 20%. Men's were even worse. Many were 12% with 1 at approximately 23%. I attempted to ask the company about the shoes and never heard from them. I question their business ethics.

title: If there was a negative I would answer…
body: If there was a negative I would answer with that. This company has nothing but lie, postpone, and re ask the same questions. They have lied about their return policy, the time frame to return, never sending an address to return the shoes to. They are telling me I can only receive a store credit when their web site didn’t say that. I’ve felt with a few companies like this and resolved the problems, this company just keeps lying and never answers the questions except with a repeat letter of the same kind. Still all that and still haven’t received any real answer.

title: I purchased these shoes for my daughter…
body: I purchased these shoes for my daughter who works in a hospital. I ordered the size she normally wears and they are too long for her feet. They are also heavy and bulky for her. I have been attempting to return these shoes for two weeks. I am getting the runaround. So much for the "free return guarantee" I will have to dispute the charge in my card. To be clear, the shoes are unworn and simply do not fit.

title: The shoes are received are quite small…
body: The shoes are received are quite small for US sizes. I am trying to return. They asked for a picture with the size showing. I sent them one twice , now not getting info on where to return them.

title: They are too big
body: They are too big, not true to size and not as comfortable as I thought they would be.

title: The shoes ordered did not fit well and…
body:
The shoes ordered did not fit well and did not offer the support offered of the foot, since it is made of a stretch mesh material.
Contacted them in order to return and ask for a refund.
Offered only 30% refund. Then asked me to go to a Salvation Army donation center and donate the shoes, then return a donation slip in order to get refund. Shoes ordered in Quebec and the donation center does not give donation slips. Was finally offered a 50% refund or to ship the shoes back to a US address would have cost me too much money considering the postal rates to ship internationally. Did non guarantee a full refund, only after their inspection of the product. Also the shoes were shipped from Canadian base. Finally accepted the 50% refund because this had been going on for 3 weeks. They definitely do not respect their 45 days total refund policy.. What a scam company. Also the product had a fowl strong cheap plastic smell. Do not do business with this company.

title: Poor quality and horrible return policy
body:
The shoes were very uncomfortable. My daughter couldn't wear them. And they were not slip proof as they said they were. When we contacted Comfort Wear for a refund they tried pushing us off. Offering a credit instead. Finally they gave us an address to return them at our cost. We live in Canada! This will cost anywhere from $30 to $60. The shoes were only $90

Total scam, not happy at all

title: I wish I had taken the time to read all…
body: I wish I had taken the time to read all the reviews of this company before I bought a pair of their shoes. They promised refunds, but when I couldn't easily put on the shoes (which came in no box), and when I did they didn't fit, they offered me a 30% refund so I could donate the shoes, and not add to the landfill! Another request for full refund got me the wear for 45 days response, which I cannot do, and now am being ghosted by their "customer service". Buyer beware: I should have been.

title: 2 months and still no shoes
body:
I ordered the shoes November 11, on the confirmation email they said it usually is received in six to ten days. Then I checked tracking info and it said it was in Flower Mound Texas on November 24th, then it just never moved from there. I contacted customer service and they said they would look into it. several emails later and they are continually saying they are sorry for the inconvenience. Last email I sent them. I told them I wanted my money back cause I bought these shoes for a trip coming up. They sent back an email and said they suspect that my shipment was lost and that if I will give them my address again, they will send me shoes at no cost to me. I don’t know if that means they’re not gonna charge me shipping or if they’re not gonna charge him again for shoes I’ve already paid for no offered refund my money so I sent them my address and we’ll see what happens. I’ll update this in the future. I ended up contacting my credit card company and disputing the charges. Since I had never received the shoes they credited my account . Then I once again contacted comfort wear and told them I was disputing
the charges , two days later the vendor told me they were refunded my money. The only thing is I still got charged the two months interest on my card.

title: The shoes arriveLow Quality Product & Refund Never Receivedd with poor overall…
body:
The shoes arrived with poor overall quality. They look cheap and unfinished, with visible marks that resemble paint or coating defects. The materials did not match the product photos and the shoes did not appear well-made.

The customer service experience was even more disappointing. When I requested a refund, I was repeatedly pushed to keep the shoes instead of being allowed a standard return. I was told I could only receive a refund if I donated the shoes and provided proof of donation, or accept a partial (50%) refund to keep them. Even after sending photos and following their instructions, I never received my refund.

This process felt unnecessarily complicated and unfair. Between the low product quality and the lack of a proper refund, I would not purchase from this company again.

title: I ordered shoes from Comfortwear
body: I ordered shoes from Comfortwear. They do not untie and I have very high arches. My feet will not go into the shoes. I wrote to try and send them back and get a reimbursement. It is obvious they don't read my letters. They said to try them for a month. They have not reimbursed me and say they do not want the shoes back because they would have to trash them. I just want my money back!!!

title: No resolution for shoes that didn't fit.
body: I ordered 2 pair of their shoes for the first time. They were too big, so I requested either the preferred trade for a smaller size or a refund and order the smaller size. They then asked me to take a picture of the size in the shoes. After I did that, they informed that they sent what I had requested so would not refund. Also, I did not get responses to multiple initial requests. I've worn the same size shoe for decades so did not anticipate an issue. The shoes do look like they would be good quality, so I was disappointed in the customer service.

title: Refund not quaranteed
body: I purchased these runners based on the company’s 100% guarantee. Unfortunately, the shoes were too big and did not fit properly. When I requested a return, instead of honoring the return policy, I was offered a 20% discount to keep shoes I cannot wear. This does not align with a 100% guarantee. Very disappointing experience.

title: Do not buy from ComfortWear
body: I feel if anyone has written a positive review of this company they are lying. The quality is very poor. The customer service is horrible. I had to contact Comfort Wear multiple times as well as I contacted my credit card. They finally refunded me. Do not buy anything from this company unless you enjoy poorly manufactured shoes and no customer service. I don’t normally write reviews but hopefully this helps someone avoid the stress of buying from this company.

title: Please save yourself trouble and do not risk ordering from this company!
body: I received the wrong color and the size is too big. I have reached out to the company five times but they continue to put me off and will not give me the information so I can return them and get a refund. Even on their own website, it does not allow you to give a one or two star review. I am incredibly frustrated as they promise a “45 day money back return”! Unless you have money to throw away, DO NOT ORDER FROM THIS COMPANY!

title: Returns
body: These shoes do not run to the size of the USA these shoes I ordered a size 8 and 1/2 and got a 3 and 1/2 they resent the order and they're too big I want to return them but they will not accept a return I would strongly advise not ordering from them

title: Do not give these people your business
body: They took over a month to get here. The shoes were shoddily made. I wore them less than six hours, and I was sitting down a good portion of the time, and I was hobbled. So painful. So I politely asked how to return them for the full refund. First they told me to wear them for 45 days. I declined because I couldn’t wear them for 6 hours. Then they were “sad” and wanted me to donate them for a 20% refund. “Sustainability,” they said. I again declined for reasons too numerous to get into and asked how to return the shoes for a full refund per their policy. They then offered a gift card for another pair. By this time, I was suspicious and getting angry. What part of full refund do they not understand? Do they actually think I’d buy anything from them again? Hell no. I’ve gotten another offer to donate and a refund; however, they won’t give me an amount. This was their second counteroffer. I asked for clarification on the amount, and I’ve been ghosted. I finally went to my bank and disputed the charge. I printed out every email showing their refusal to adhere to their policy. I finally found quite a few reviews stating this happens often. They’re not even original because my experience was identical to several others. Beware

title: The order took over 2 weeks to receive
body:
The order took over 2 weeks to receive. However they sent many text messages to spend more money. When I received them, they had a very strong chemical smell, came in a bag, no shipping protection and they were the wrong size!

I wouldn’t recommend

title: I received the wrong size of shoes and…
body: I received the wrong size of shoes and it has been imposible to make Customer Service understand that I need to received the size of shoes I ordered. It has been a nightmare.

title: DONT ORDER THESE
body: DONT ORDER THESE. I BEG YOU DONT. First of all I had to buy ball foot pads and a shoe horn by the second day. My husbands insoles started pulling out within 4 days. I told customer service I wanted a refund and they only offered me 30% back and keep the shoes. I told them NO I wanted a full refund. WELL they STILL wouldn’t. They told me to take them to a Salvation Army and donate them and get a receipt and provide them the receipt for a refund. I told them I live 5 hours away from the nearest Salvation Army and if they were going to reimburse me for gas money to get them there. THEY STILL HAVENT RESPONDED BACK. ITS A JOKE. PLEASE SAVE YOUR MONEY. DONT BUY THESE. THEY ARE JUNK!!!!

title: On going and waiting since Dec 12
body: I bought a pair of sneakers .did not fit . I want to return them . They want to give me a new pair and 20%refund. No thank you .i just want a full refund . They have not responded .they just say take them to a Salvation Army and donate them get a receipt . Mail it to us and they will determine to accept or reject my request . Now no one will respond at all . Two different numbers both leading to the same recorded message .saying they are helping other customers . Send a message …..I have sent at least 8messages . Nothing postitive about a refund at all . I have clearly read the return policy but they will not respond …..they are pushing me towards the 45 days not return no refund time limit . I’m sure .

title: Worst company EVER!!
body: If I could give this company negative Stars I would. This is the literally the worst company I've ever had to deal with. The return policy is beyond unreasonable and I've had to fight them now for weeks just to return my shoes. They're forcing me to donate the shoes and get a slip from the center I donate them to in order to get a refund. I've been fighting them about this for far too long. The customer service on their end has been absolutely abhorrent. They pretend like they're trying to do a good thing by forcing you to donate the shoes, which by the way I really don't want to because the shoes are so awful I don't want anyone else having to deal with such terrible shoes... I was likely going to do it anyway but the fact that they're forcing this on a customer just to get a freaking refund is absolutely insane. The shoes are awful the company is even worse never do business with these people.

title: First they trick you with compression…
body: First they trick you with compression socks added to the order then no returns. The shoes are terrible. I’ve had them over a month. They are wide I put in inserts per cs and they are still wide walking in them is really uncomfortable. Doesn’t make any difference if flat or hilly. Can’t recommend these at all

title: Worst shoe after trying to break them…first time and last time buyer
body: Worst shoe after trying to break them in. Feels like walking on boards with pins and needles.

title: Order at your own risk
body: The shoe style claimed to fit wide but instead was extremely narrow in shape and fit. I emailed and called the company numerous times asking for a return to be initiated, they claim a 45 day refund guarantee. They were prolonging my request. When they did reply it was days in between & bizarre content & requests (rip out the sole to take a picture of the size) in which I responded, "no way, you have my order invoice!!". This company's phone number is not a true method for contact and their email replies were odd & delayed. Check the BBB about this fraudulent company.

title: Bad Business Poor Business Practices
body: Shoes look nice. I ordered wide because feet are wide. The soles are a hard rubber. Tried them on put back in the sack requested a refund and return label. They said they sent me the size I ordered and offered 20% or a credit. I would not have ordered if I knew they DONOT honor their refund policy. Frankly I am tired of companies that refuse to follow their policies and are allowed to do business still. This company is a ZERO

title: Awful experience!
body:
Do not buy from this company.
They assure you comfort but their product is far from being comfortable. They're also not the proper size, too large and too big. I ordered 2 pairs, one sandals and one running shoe, I received the sandals and the size is really off so I can't wear them. For the other pair, for months, they kept on telling me; 'yes we are aware that it hasn't been shipped yet but are doing our very best as our manufacturing is extremely busy at this time due to the quantity of orders, but rest assured that we will be shipping out your order as soon as the product will be ready.' This is been going on since April 2025, and in September, when I sent another email, they responded that my order had been shipped and that many months went by and I was then asked to send a picture of the pair I had received, along with the shipment tag on the bag in which I received them, back in April, that they would look at it all and get back to me. As for the sandals, I received countless emails giving me all sorts of excuses on why not to return them. This company plays with peoples' minds, they don't ship what you order and they literally put you through hell. Conclusion; I never got my running shoes, the sandals were big and cheaply made. The upper part is a very uncomfortable material that has a buckle but you can't do anything with it, and the bottom even worse, hard as rock and your foot gets really quickly. The exchange of emails was very unprofessional on their behalf, they refused to reimburse me for the pair that they never shipped and they made me lose mind till I gave up and didn't bother them anymore.

title: No customer service!
body: I ordered 2 pairs of shoes to prepare for an upcoming trip. The shoes did not arrive in time but I still gave the shoes a try. Even though there is a return policy that I am within, this company has not be responsive in sending me the return label I have requested for a month now. The only email I have received was an offer to accept 20% off which I declined immediately since the shoes do not fit me properly. I have emailed 4+ times and have called twice to request the return label so I can get my refund. Their "customer service" phone number goes to a recording that they are helping other customers which I highly doubt. I am simply requesting to return shoes that were not even worn outside well within the parameters of the return policy, and this company has had more than enough time to honor their return policy!

title: Boots way too large and terrible customer support
body:
Ordered a pair of winter boots. My size is 8.5 so I chose size 9 to be on the safe side. After three weeks it finally arrived only that it was too large. Apparently when u choose size 9 it could be up to 9.5. I contacted them after few days the asked me to take a pic of the size. On it it said 46. Few days later they got back to me and said they’ve sent the correct size so they can offer me 20% off and I keep it. This is is equivalent to 10–10.5. So it’s useless. I replied that it's too large and I’d like to return it. Every time I contact them through email it takes 4-5 days for them to respond. I think by the time this is settled it’s gonna be spring.

They finally responded and offered a gift certificate instead of a return. I agreed and since gave it to a friend who matched the size. Within few days he said that there’s an opening at the seam and water gets in. So there u be the judge. All and all, terrible experience.

title: Not good quality
body: Shoes were to big, the soles are plastic and obvious not slip resistant so they are not comfortable at all!!

title: I ordered 2 pairs of shoes they were…
body: I ordered 2 pairs of shoes they were both wrong size it seems that these shoes are picked by what ever they have and they have no tags or markings on them showing what size they are I wasn’t paying attention I actually thought I was buying from KURU when I put on the shoes from comfortwear shoes felt nothing like KURU shoes but comfortwear is a scam unfortunately paid a lot of money but now I know comfortwear and the only place to buy shoes is KURU although putting on their shoes is incredibly painful but because they are actually working on your feet taking them off makes you forget about pain is with your feet again comfortwear is a scam try it out if you want to find out I and most others do not recommend comfortwear

title: Lied about return policy
body:
Per the company's promise of free returns within 45 days, I requested a return of the shoes. They responded with an email that they were "so sad" I did not like the shoes and directed me to keep wearing the shoes for 45 days to let my feet get used to them and then contact customer service if they still did not feel comfortable. Of course I told them I wasn't going to wear uncomfortable shoes for 45 days and again requested a full refund and instructions for the free return shipping. This time they said they didn't want to waste material, citing safe hygiene to protect their employees and environmental sustainability. I told them the shoes were in perfect condition and I was ready to return them. They replied that since they were in good condition it would be a waste to return them and I should gift them to someone. The next email told me to please accept a gift card in the amount of the original order to use on their website.
FYI: The terms and conditions (small print ) on the online store says they will not be liable for any changes in their warranty or service at any time . AVOID THIS STORE!!!

title: Absolutely terrible experience
body:
Absolutely terrible experience. The shoes didn’t fit, and on top of that, this company turned out to be liars. They advertise a “45-day money-back guarantee,” but they refused to let me return the shoes. I contacted them the very next day—no response. I had to email again, and instead of honoring their own policy, they tried to give me a small discount to keep shoes I can’t even use. I needed them for a trip, and their “solution” was for me to donate the shoes and send them a receipt. Seriously?

I came back, emailed again, and now they’re just ignoring me completely.

This company is dishonest. Their customer service is nonexistent. DO NOT BUY THEIR SHOES.

title: Bad experience
body: ordered a pair of shoes from ComfortWear.com, but they unfortunately didn’t provide the arch support I needed. I contacted their customer support to request a return, but the responses have been slow and I keep getting pushback. It’s now been three weeks and I still haven’t received my refund. Based on my experience, I would not purchase from them again.

title: Don’t buy these shoes!
body: Don’t buy these shoes!! I’d read the reviews. They said they would return them for any reason. The ones I received have a flaw in the bottom which makes it feels like there’s something in your shoe. I ask them for a refund and they said they would give me 20% off to keep them. They are damaged. I do not want them. I want a full refund and they have ghosted me since I said then I wanted a full refund.

title: Full refund not given for shoes that do not fit
body: I ordered shoes in the size I wear. When they arrived after a long ship period, they did not fit. Too short and too narrow. I contacted customer service and was told to take a photo of the shoes. I sent it, but then they asked for a photo showing the size. I took what I could find and then they asked me for a third photo under the tongue of the shoe. The size was not an American size. They said I got what I ordered. They first offered a 30% refund. I said I want a full refund, and where can I return the shoes in the USA? They said no full refund, either get a new pair of shoes free, or a gift certificate in the amount of the shoes. The reason she gave was some nonsensical statements about sustainability. I do not want to do any further business with this company so I suppose I will accept the 30% refund, though I do not hold my breath about getting it.

title: Do not buy from them
body: Paid $7.00 extra for faster delivery still didn't come in tell 2 weeks later. Ask to return shoes for a full refund spent almost 2 weeks back and forth by email trying to give me a partial credit. They don't answer their phones. Then instead of returning they want you to take it to a salvation army, get receipt show proof you donated before the will return your money. Worst place and experience ever. Never again.

title: Poor Customer Service & Exchange Policy
body: The shoes were too small even though I ordered the size I normally wear. I requested an exchange and the Company stalled and then offered me a 20% refund. Since even with a 20% discount the shoes are still to small, so I'm giving the shoes to charity and chalking this up to a poor service experience.

title: I am extremely dissatisfied with…
body: I am extremely dissatisfied with ComfortWear due to poor service and refusal to honor the return policy. Did not express strongly enough do not order for his company.

title: Scam
body: Unfortunately ordered it without doing research, attempted to cancel order right after order, 2 days before shipping. They would not comply. Offered a discount instead. Do NOT buy these shoes.

title: Their refund policy is a scam!!
body: I ordered shoes and when I tried them on, they were too small. I contacted the company asking for a refund which their website states that they will do a refund if the customer request it. The company offered to send me a larger pair of shoes and I don't have to return the too small ones. I agreed but I have never received the larger pair. The charge is still on my credit card. So I have paid for a pair of shoes that I can't wear!!!! I first contacted this company on October 17, 2025 and today is December 2, 2025 and the issue has not been resolved. I will never purchase from them again.

title: I bought these shoes based on the ad on…
body: I bought these shoes based on the ad on Facebook I like the design and I like the colour I chose, which was the purple. When it came in, I tried them on and they were too big in general. They fit in length and that was it. I didn’t find them comfortable whatsoever, and I did not like the drawstring closure. I emailed the company told him I would like to return them for a credit onto my credit card. I then received an email asking me if I’d like to keep them with a discount. I said no as they were too big and I wouldn’t wear them. I would like to return them and get my refund. I received another email saying keep the shoes for hygiene reasons I can kind of understand that and get behind it but they’re trying to give me a gift credit note which I did not ask for nor do I want I’d asked for a return on my credit card. I find it very frustrating when a company can’t just do what they say and you can get your money back when I ask for a refund I want a refund.

title: Totally fake and no return policy
body:
I was looking to order a pair of sneakers since I had heel pain and their ads looked so good and convincing. And they did cost around $100 plus and seemed genuine. But once they arrived I knew I fell for a rubbish pair.
Firstly they didn't even have a proper package, just came wrapped in a plastic. Tried them on for the first day and absolutely no cushioning. Felt like I was walking on a hard surface and made my pain worse.
Emailed them several times but absolutely no reply, they only keep sending promotional emails.
Just a total scam. Please stay away from this company.

title: sneakers are too big 45 day return…
body: sneakers are too big 45 day return policy is false still waiting they play a cat & mouse game

title: Do not buy, waste of money. Bad customer service

To return the item and get a refund too forever!!! Weeks of them offering discounts, exchanges, etc until finally I had to go donate the shoes send them a donation receipt to get my money back.

Buy a beware !! I do not buy from this company the worst of the worst shame on them!

title: RETURN POLICY IS A SHAM
body:
When the shoes arrived they did not fit, I Ordered two pairs and could not get my feet into either pair. not a big deal, it happens when ordering online, No worries, I will just return them for a new size right? Wrong.

The customer support team refused to allow me to send them back. Instead told me to “keep them, and here is a 30% refund toward your next purchase.” What? The shoes are mint. Pristine, never even touched the floor, AND WHY WOULD I KEEP SHOES THAT DONT FIT?! And according to their refund policy AND MONEY BACK GARUNTEE, I had all of the original packaging and was well within the 45 day purchase period. So I contacted them again, saying I cant keep them, they don't fit, they were expensive please let me exchange them. Same thing, they told me to keep them and kept offering credit and gift cards.. So at this point I want a full refund. This is a scam. Has to be. They will not adhere to their own return policy! They finally said that if I donate them they will refund me. So I did, I donated them to good will and got the donation slip, sent them pictures showing the shoes were still in the original packaging along with the donation slip! And they responded saying "Thank you for providing proof of donation, but however we need actual proof of donation" WHAT?! I sent pictures of the donation slip I received of the donation a long with photos of me TAKING THEM TO DONATION. Nowhere in previous emails did they spell out that they needed an itemized list. I provided literally exactly what they asked for. Not to mention this is nowhere on their refund policy page.
I will be telling everyone I can, everyone I work with to NEVER BUY SHOES FROM COMFORT WEAR, its a scam. They probably send shoes you can’t fit into on purpose, then make sure you cant return them and keep your money. These shoes were not cheap. They refuse to work with me to A: exchange the shoes, and B: get a refund according to their own policy. I will be putting this review on every review source I can manage.

They have wasted my time and money, and If I could give 0 stars I would. Never using comfort wear ever again.

title: Worst Customer Service and Product
body: Absolutely would not recommend this brand to anyone! I selected shoe size based on their size guide and while it fit in length, the width was too big and could not be adjusted. There is little to no arch support and the laces hang over the sides dangerously low causing trips to occur. I requested a refund after the first day of wearing the shoes I spent quite a bit of money on and was told I HAD to wait the 45 days before requesting a refund. I complied even though I knew they weren’t the shoes for me. When I requested a refund the second time they came back with a 20% refund and a recommendation that I “gift them to a friend.” I couldn’t afford the shoes to begin with but I desperately needed shoes that gave me support at work so I took a chance. Their offer of a 20% refund was so insulting. Not to mention that after I made the purchase my shoes arrived late and smelled horrible!

title: This company sold me a very bad quality…
body: This company sold me a very bad quality shoes looks like the one sold by Temu and claimed they are ortho shoes. Shipping took almost 10 days and shoes came in ziploc bag with no box or shoebox. I tried their shoes and right away I knew is a bad shoes. My feet wiggled left and right as I walk around trying them. The heel is very high pushes my toes forward causing pain. Emailed them asking for refund, the customer service tried to tell me to try their shoes for 45 days and to contact them after 45 days for refund while their return policy clearly stated return within 45 days in same condition as received. So they are trying to make customer forfeit the 45 days so customer unable to return it. Do not buy their shoes, they are cheap shoes with bad quality.
