Ordering was easy, the fit is perfect. However the pressure on the ball if the foot is hard. Fascia and heel are more comfortable.

Well they are very comfortable

body: I just wore my shoes for the first time. They felt really comfortable at first. After an hour I had to take them off because my feet started to hurt. I’m hoping this isn’t the case. They just have to be broke in. The laces also are too long.

title: There ok shoes
body: There ok shoes. Even though you not let us return the wrong size shoes.

body: My son is one his feet all day and I bought him a pair and he Loves them. No more foot pain. He works at HEB and does a lot of walking. Plus his foot pain is gone.

I think a 12 would be too big so I will try to work with this. I just got them yesterday so haven’t fully tested them yet.

title: Not as comfortable as I thought they would be
body: Delivery of my shoes was reasonable. The description was slightly misleading. They do support my arches and they do run slightly bigger (I usually wear a 7.5 and I bought an 8). But, the reviews stated that they were comfortable. The cushioning (if you call it that) is very hard and after wearing them for awhile, my feet were hurting. Not impressed.

title: Will I love these shoes?
body:
My maiden voyage taking these shoes on their first outing was on Friday, 11/28. I spent a good part of the day in them.
I love the look. They were comfy, as your name implies).. I just thought they would have had a bit more cushion. I'll be putting some inserts in to make them more cozy.

title: Pleasantly surprised with item comfort and arrival…
body: Was skeptical at first that I would even get them but they did arrive without issue. They are very light weight and even though I have not worn them for any length of time yet, they seem to be surprisingly comfortable. Looking forward to wearing them at work.

title: Purchasing on Website was easy
body: Purchasing on Website was easy. Delivery was as expected. When I opened packaging there was a horrible smell! I had to let air out several days before wearing. I’m still getting used to the way they fit but so far it has been good. Will see what happens when I go in for my nursing shift tomorrow.

title: I really like this shoe
body: I really like this shoe. However, sizing is a challenge. I ordered my normal size 9 and they sent 41 which is next size up. I had to add an orthotic insert and thicker socks to achieve comfortable fit. The shoe is very comfortable. Just wish they offered half sizes.

title: Walked all day without pain
body: My feet pronate severely and I have always had issues with shoes rubbing just below the ankle. These shoes gave me support without pain. I did have to add an extra insert to provide more cushion

title: Have only had my shoes for a few days…
body: Have only had my shoes for a few days but can feel the difference in my legs and feet.

title: Very reasonable price for comfortable…
body: Very reasonable price for comfortable shoes I use for walking. Time will tell about durability of these shoes.

title: Ordering was easy

According to the website - suggestion was to order 1 size up, I ordered a 7.5) I normally wear a size 7. My feet slide forward when walking. Very roomy inside. Hopefully I can get these returned or exchange for the correct size.

title: Pleasantly surprised
body: I’ve only had these shoes for 3 days and they are quite comfortable. Easy to slip into. I have chronic back pain and these have helped make it bearable so that’s awesome for me. Plenty of toe room and they even look good. I’ll most likely buy another pair when I need shoes again. I got them for work. I do janitorial work so am on my feet for at least 8 hours.

title: Easy to place the order

body: Shipping time was good. My heel pain is diminished. However the sick like opening to put my foot in the shoe makes it more difficult to get it on. Love the colors, but I do feel that the shoe could have a little bit more cushion for comfort.

body: I was really looking forward to trying the shoes I ordered for my sore feet. I always wear a 6.5 shoe size. These run big,more like a 7. I haven't been able to find a contact for an exchange for a smaller size.

body: I would give it a 5 star but the insert is not very comfortable i have to change it out I was hoping for a more cushion in the shoe beside that the shoes fit very well and is well made . I have right foot problem and the shoes help some so I am satisfied with them would recommend them .

body: I loved the outter sole because the grip was excellent, the material soft ankle and easy to slip on, the insole heal cushion but the arch support wasn't as I expected. 4 🌟 for those reasons but unfortunately I will be returning for a refund.

title: So far, So good
body: The shoes are comfortable and fit well. I am curious as to why the shoes are advertised as being "so comfortable" but then they try to upsell the gel insoles.

body:
The shoes unfortunately will not work for me. I didn’t realize that they were slip in. I wear
braces for foot drop, the braces don’t work.

title: Comfortable shoes but tricky to put on.
body: The purchase process was straight forward, and the shoe size was accurately represented in the size guide. Shipping was within a reasonable time frame. My only concern has been in actually getting the shoes onto my feet. I found it difficult to keep the tongue area and heels from folding into the shoe as I inserted my feet. With practice this has improved but I do need to use a shoe horn to hold the back of the shoe in place. Once on, the shoes are extremely comfortable but the process is still a bit frustrating. They are not the type of shoes to wear if you need to be taking them off and putting them on regularly. Some type of guide on how to put them on efficiently would be welcome.

title: I am a retired nurse
body: I am a retired nurse. These shoes were like walking on a cloud. I am not doing 12 hour shifts any more but chasing a 1 yr. old grand baby. For people with high instep, the slip on is difficult. My mistake for not getting a tie on pair.

title: Good, but make room for your toes!

I am 70 and have some trouble with ankle strength and need a flatter “zero” type shoe. I thought these would work well around the house, but it seems I need a flatter heel to give my ankle less ability to twist.

title: Disappointed

The website says money back guarantee, but it took several emails, a charity donation & proof of donation before they were willing to consider a refund. Before that, they offered me 30% off a new purchase!

title: I didn't give it a 5 because the…

I made some adjustments on the toe strap and the shoes have been soo comfortable ever since. Highly recommend and I'll be looking into some walking shoes for the fall and winter months!

title: The shoes are very comfortable
body: The shoes are very comfortable! I work 12 hours shifts as a nurse and my feet are screaming by the end of the day. After one day of wearing these shoes, I noticed a big difference. My heels especially felt better. My feet were still a little sore but much better than without these shoes.

I just want my right size

title: Easy to order

title: Shoe is great
body: Shoe is great, love the color, Size fits to big. Took over 3 weeks to get.

title: I really find the shoes very comfy.
body: I really find the shoes very comfortable and lightweight. I like the colors too. My only complaint would be that I emailed them about the size, mine said 37 and they felt slightly big on me. I normally wear a 5.5/6 women's shoe. No one emailed me back! I wanted to order another pair but since they didn't answer me, I wasn't sure if I should get the smaller size, I didn't order again.

title: Nice fit
body: Shipping took longer than I thought it should, but the shoes fit very nicely. Needed to add an insert for my arches but over all a great fitting pair of shoes.

title: I wanted cute and comfy but.
body: Shoes arrived quickly and were comfortable after the first wearing. However, I ordered what looked to be red and what was denominated the color red. What I got was a box labeled red but the shoes are a horrible purplish color-/the last color I would ever choose

title: Buy one size larger and the incerts
body: The website reviews mentioned the shoes run small, so buy the next size up. I'm glad I did. However, even though the length of the shoe fits, there is a lot of room from top to bottom. I had to add insoles to make it more comfortable. Yet walking down hills my foot slides forward and my toes then squish. The thickness of the soles do help ease the pain in my heel while walking. The shoes just don't cup and hold the foot as they should for what they claim. As long as you're not walking up and down hills, they are great. The black on black design I can make pass as dress shoes-ish for work, unlike Merrells, which do hold a foot well for a much higher price, but can't pass for office shoes. The bone bruise on my left foot has been feeling better since I started wearing these shoes for a week. I still have to keep my foot up and allow things to heal, yet I still have to walk my dog and move about on my own. So the shoes are helping me.

title: Comfortable but my foot slides in them
body: Comfortable but my foot slides in them. I need to go down a half size

title: I took a chance on these shoes and I'm glad I did.
body: I took a chance on these shoes and after a bit have decided to keep them. They felt big although I ordered my regular size. After experimenting with different socks, I found a thickness that worked and they feel fine. They are nice and wide in the toe box; the fabric at the ankle comes up really high, but the material is so soft and stretchy that it feels supportive rather than chaffing. I thought there would be more support in the arch, but I put in an arch support I had and it felt better. The cut of this shoe is different than anything I've had before, but the more I wear them, the happier I am that I'm keeping them.

title: it’s very light to walk and comfortable
body: It’s okay , with ease and comfort .

title: I thought I was going to really like…shoe review
body: I thought I was going to really like these shoes. My main complaint is getting them on. Otherwise, they were comforty all day. Until evening time, then they were too comfy. Had toget out of the coush.

title: Shop delivery app was useless but product of good quality, albeit not much arch support
body:
The communication during shopping and delivery was fine except for the “Shop App”. That app reported the sneakers to be delivered only three days after we ordered it! It was not, but it was delivered after a week as promised so the problem was with the Shop app, not ComfortWear. It would have been better if ComfortWear had just given us a tracking number

The product is of nice quality, but did not have close to the arch support I had hoped for. I will buy an insert to help.

title: Great so far.
body: Quick delivery. Takes a bit to get used to wearing them though. Easy to put on and take off. Get a size larger when ordering though. Mine are a tad bit smaller than what I am used to but ordered the equivalent sizing.

title: Love the knit upper on my purple shoes
body: Love the knit upper on my purple shoes, vey comfortable and no foot pain all day. Even after a 13 hours shift. The light gray and pink with the bungee laces didn't fit the same and were less comfortable. So I likely will stay with the knit uppers only.

title: The shoes came rather quickly
body: The shoes came rather quickly. Very pretty looking. I could have used a size smaller, but they are okay I am using them to walk and use 2 pair of socks.

title: Clarity of all the information required when someone is buying over the counter or online. The options of what you’re selling is…
body:
The options of what you’re selling is good. There’s plenty of choices, colours, sizes. Great.
I’m just a bit concerned why it takes more than 10 days before I will receive my order. Where is it actually originating the order?
See, I made my order more than 10 days ago but I haven’t received this order yet. No movement of mailing is showing online. I’m worried I’m being scammed.
You’re pricing should show that the qouted price is USDollars to allow me to calculate how much is debited in my account.

title: Website OK. Shipping is slow.
body: If this is just a review for my experience on the website, it was good. No issues with navigating and checking out. But I haven't received my shoes yet, so I can't say if they're good or not. It's been 12 days so shipping isn't too great.

title: Shipping was quick

title: That I didn't have to go to a store to…

title: Like walking on clouds~

They're a bit tough to stretch over my heel but the toe box is generous and, like I mentioned, they're supremely comfortable! It's usually tough to find cute, comfortable shoes in my size but I really hit the jackpot with these babies! My mom has arthritic feet and she loves the pair I bought her too!

title: The shoes are great The shoes are great. I was reading the reviews and a lot of people said that they come in small so get the bigger size, they are too big. I should’ve gotten the size I wear. I have
